summary: Frontend-only verification of ERR_BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE fix on /place/{Bar Basso}. Map iframe now uses OpenStreetMap embed with correct Bar Basso marker (45.4767746,9.2175792). Video links use youtube-nocookie.com/embed. No blocked-by-response console errors. All regression targets (google-maps-link, google-maps-directions, home card-maps) still functional.
passed: google-maps-embed iframe src contains marker=45.4767746,9.2175792 (Bar Basso coords)
'On the map' heading rendered on PlaceDetail
formatted_address visible: 'Bar Basso', 'Via Plinio', 'Milano' all present in body
video-source-0 href = https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/poWhzmMdv0M (real video id, correct nocookie embed URL, no watch?v=)
Home page loads and renders 86 card-maps buttons
Zero ERR_BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE / 'refused to connect' console errors during PlaceDetail load
notes: Backend not tested per request. Enrich flow regression (POST /api/enrich/{id}) not re-tested since only frontend URL construction changed; underlying video ids from DB are unchanged and video-source-0 rendered a valid real id (poWhzmMdv0M). Bar Basso PlaceDetail loaded cleanly with OSM iframe embedded without frame-blocking errors.
